text.title: ops-automation-workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-automation-workflow as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Automating a process before running it manually at least twice and documenting the exact steps.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: An undefined process cannot be correctly automated. Automating ambiguity at machine speed produces large-scale incorrect outcomes.

failure-mode.description: Building complex branching logic into a single automation workflow.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Complex automations are fragile and hard to debug. Split complex logic into simpler, chained automations. Each automation should do one thing clearly.

failure-mode.description: Setting up an automation and not reviewing it for 3+ months.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: APIs change, SaaS tools update, data formats shift. An unreviewed automation silently breaks months after deployment. Review all active automations monthly.
